statusLine.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(jq -r '.workspace.current_dir' <<< "$input"); model=$(jq -r '.model.display_name' <<< "$input" | sed 's/Claude //'); cd "$dir" 2>/dev/null; repo=$(basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)"); branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); usage=$(jq '.context_window.current_usage' <<< "$input"); if [ "$usage" != "null" ]; then cur=$(jq '.input_tokens + .cache_creation_input_tokens + .cache_read_input_tokens' <<< "$usage"); sz=$(jq '.context_window.context_window_size' <<< "$input"); pct=$((cur * 100 / sz))%; else pct="-"; fi; usage_stats=$($HOME/.claude/hooks/format-usage.sh 2>/dev/null || echo 'A:0 S:0'); printf '%s | %s | %s | %s | %s' "$pct" "$model" "$repo" "$branch" "$usage_stats"
